endpoints.description: Zalando filtered listing HTML. After the Germany storefront and direct filtered listing URL are loaded, call the current listing URL with browser_api_call fetch_mode=browser. The runtime compacts the hydration cache into ranked product cards with brand, name, price, detail URL, available sizes, and rating visibility.
strategy_notes: Use the direct listing URL after selecting Germany and clearing the cookie dialog. Do not open product details just to read sizes or absent ratings.
Call browser_api_call on the current en.zalando.de listing URL with fetch_mode=browser so the request uses the browser session and avoids external HTTP 403.
Answer top products from the compact zalando_listing items. If rating is missing or the compact result says rating=not shown, record customer rating as not shown.
The compact items include sizes from the listing hydration simples/simplesWithStock arrays; treat those as available sizes.

runtime_strategies.name: zalando_direct_listing_hydration
runtime_strategies.trigger: Zalando listing tasks with category, color, size, price, brand, or newest/sort filters

actions.description: Build the filtered en.zalando.de listing URL before reading product cards.
Call browser_api_call on the current listing URL so the runtime compacts hydration product cards.

observable_validation: current URL encodes the requested category/filter/sort state
zalando_listing compact output has product cards with brand, price, URL, sizes, and rating visibility
missing rating is accepted as not shown instead of opening detail pages repeatedly
notes: Use UK storefronts only for GBP tasks; Euro tasks should stay on en.zalando.de.

endpoints.description: Zalando product detail HTML. Use browser_api_call fetch_mode=browser for top listing candidates that need material composition or rating verification; the runtime compacts material and rating fields from the detail page.
strategy_notes: Call detail URLs with browser_api_call rather than navigating product tabs when only materials or rating are missing.
Use this only for the top listing candidates returned by zalando_listing; cap follow-up calls at three.
If rating is missing or rating=not shown, record customer rating as not shown instead of repeatedly opening review widgets.

runtime_strategies.name: zalando_detail_material_rating_compaction
runtime_strategies.trigger: Top Zalando listing candidates need material composition or rating after listing hydration

actions.description: Call browser_api_call on each top product detail URL and use the zalando_detail compact result.

observable_validation: zalando_detail compact output contains materials or rating for the requested product URL
rating=not shown is accepted after one compact detail call
notes: Do not navigate product detail pages solely for materials when browser_api_call can compact the same HTML.
